title: DMARC
helpOutput:
Usage: dmarc [<options>] <domain>

  Look up and analyze DMARC policy for a domain.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <domain>  Domain name to look up DMARC policy for
output:
{
  "Domain": "google.com",
  "DMARC Record": "v\u003dDMARC1; p\u003dreject; rua\u003dmailto:mailauth-reports@google.com",
  "Version": "DMARC1",
  "Policy": "reject (block delivery)",
  "Subdomain Policy": "same as domain policy",
  "PCT": "100%",
  "DKIM Alignment": "relaxed",
  "SPF Alignment": "relaxed",
  "Aggregate Reports (rua)": "mailto:mailauth-reports@google.com",
  "Forensic Reports (ruf)": "not configured",
  "Report Format": "afrf",
  "Report Interval": "86400s",
  "Failure Options": "0",
  "TTL": "300s"
}
